name: Underground Energy Corporation
summary: Underground Energy Corporation, an energy company, engages in the identification, acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and gas reserves from shale formations in North America. As of November 8, 2012, the company holds hydrocarbon rights on approximately 63,000 net acres of lands in California and Nevada with a focus on the Monterey shale in California. Its principal Monterey shale prospects include the Asphaltea and the Zaca Field Extension located in California's Santa Maria Basin. Underground Energy Corporation was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Santa Barbara, California.
